title: Spanish Chicken Paella
description: A traditional Spanish dish made with chicken, rice, and spices. This recipe serves a crowd and is perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chorizo and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Add the Spanish rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the white wine, paprika, chicken broth, salt, and pepper.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Remove the cover and cook for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
